cases.name: simple_led_battery
cases.prompt: A simple LED circuit with a battery and a current-limiting resistor

cases.name: simple_rc_filter
cases.prompt: A simple RC low pass filter

cases.name: timer_switch_driver
cases.prompt: Build a 12V actuator driver board with a timer-based pulse generator, MOSFET low-side load switch, timer output header, status LED, and control/load connectors.

cases.name: sensor_buffer_board
cases.prompt: Design a 12V sensor conditioning board with a 3.3V regulator, analog input header, RC low-pass filter stage, op-amp buffer stage, buffered output header, and status LED.

cases.name: fan_driver_board
cases.prompt: Build a 12V fan driver circuit with a regulated logic rail, MOSFET low-side switch, control header, flyback diode, load connector, and power/status LED.

constraints.goal: driver board for a small DC load

cases.name: complex_hbridge_partial
cases.prompt: Design an H-bridge motor driver for a 12V brushed DC motor using four MOSFETs, gate drive support, flyback protection, and control headers.

cases.name: relay_driver_board
cases.prompt: Design a 12V relay driver board with control input, flyback diode, SPDT relay, and relay contact header.

cases.name: comparator_threshold_board
cases.prompt: Create a comparator threshold detector with 5V supply, sensor input, reference divider, and comparator output header.

cases.name: protected_input_stage
cases.prompt: Design a protected 12V input stage with reverse polarity protection, fuse, TVS diode, and output header.

cases.name: usb_power_interface
cases.prompt: Create a USB-powered 5V interface board with status LED and output header.

cases.name: button_input_board
cases.prompt: Build a pushbutton input board with pull-up resistor and output header.
